name: divisi
description: Delegate Codex work to frontier-model vendor CLIs while Codex stays in charge.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate bounded Codex work to Grok and Kimi
interface.longDescription: Divisi gives Codex the skills and MCP tools to delegate bounded work to installed Grok and Kimi vendor CLIs, inspect mechanical results, and keep final judgment with the Orchestrator.
defaultPrompt: Delegate this bounded task to the best Divisi Worker and review the result.
